channel.title: Youtube Trending
channel.description:
There is a bit of chaos in an overactive mind but there is also a bit of comedy.
Stalk Me: ig: http://www.instagram.com/swoozie/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@swoozieftw
Art by that guy who stole my drawings in Mrs. Howards class: Bandit https://www.instagram.com/xbandit210/?igsh=OGQ5ZDc2ODk2ZA%3D%3D
Additional animation by: Zeurel // @ZeurelArchive
Additional music by Kevin MacLeod and the music genius known as Harry James: @HGettings
Ahhhh. You're back in the secret corner of the description eh? You know you're in a secret club right? Don't let the other know. Ok... here's the fun link I have to share this week. This playlist is legit GAS! Its great music that helps me on creative sessions or on long drives: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vpvQfCLWOn8&t=8459s
One more for ya: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Uhzm1jMV958
